name: Acceptance Testing Procedure
text: Services shall be deemed accepted upon their satisfactory completion and performance in accordance with this Agreement, unless the Client provides written notice of non-conformity within a reasonable period following completion.
invalid_if: Material breach of service specifications by the Service Provider
Fraud or misrepresentation by the Service Provider
Client was prevented from reasonably inspecting the services
title: Service Acceptance
dispute_hotspots: Client changes requirements after delivery and uses acceptance failure as pretext
